scripts.check: npm run build && npm run assert:build-public && npx wrangler deploy --dry-run
scripts.db:migration:create: npx wrangler d1 migrations create ks2-mastery-db
scripts.db:migrate:local: npx wrangler d1 migrations apply ks2-mastery-db --local
scripts.db:migrate:remote: npx wrangler d1 migrations apply ks2-mastery-db --remote
scripts.db:migrations:list:local: npx wrangler d1 migrations list ks2-mastery-db --local
scripts.db:migrations:list:remote: npx wrangler d1 migrations list ks2-mastery-db --remote
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npx wrangler deploy
